description: Set up a comprehensive multi-device monitoring environment in OpenICE to assess alarm presentation capabilities. Create four distinct simulated device adapters: a Pulse Oximeter, a Multiparameter Monitor, an Infusion Pump, and one additional device of your choice (e.g., Capnograph or NIBP). Capture screenshots of the 'Vital Signs' and 'Infusion Safety' clinical applications once data is flowing, saving them to /home/ga/Desktop/screenshot_vital_signs.png and /home/ga/Desktop/screenshot_infusion_safety.png respectively. Generate a structured alarm fatigue risk assessment report at /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_fatigue_assessment.txt including a device inventory of the four created devices, assessments of how both apps present data and alarms, at least two potential alarm fatigue risks, and two specific recommendations for improvement. The OpenICE Supervisor is already running.
